citati.besedilo: You can't change someone. You can try to understand them, watch them and listen to them. When you understand them, you can help them to change.
There is only one way - follow your heart.
Watch people carefully. You'll notice if someone is hiding something. Whether they want to or not, their behavior will give them away.
Don't mindlessly resist other people's ideas. Try to understand them. Maybe they want to show you something that you don't notice yourself.
If you notice people doing strange things, don't ask them how they did it because they won't tell you. Instead, observe them closely - the reason for their success is evident in their actions.
You can't control everyone and everything, you can only control yourself. And that's more than enough.

Never let others scare you. What they say is not true. They want to scare you into quitting, into telling them secrets... So never be scared. Instead, ask them a question they won't know the answer to. They will get scared and leave you alone.
It isn't matter how hard are you trying, there is always someone who is better than you. Don't compare yourself with other at any cost.
It you will try to win, you will lose everything you have. If you really want to win you should give up all you have.
One day you will help someone and you will be hurt very much because of helping others.
Because you speak the truth, they will oppose you, they will shame you. But at all costs, speak and do what is right. Don't care what others think of you.
You can't win a war. In a war, someone loses a lot and someone loses a little less (but both loose).
Most people will treat you as you treat them. They are like mirrors that reflect you.
What you criticize most in others is actually what bothers you about yourself. Watch yourself.
It is not important who you are. Important is what you do.
Safety is an illusion. Growth lives in the unknown, because the greatest risks hide the brightest rewards.
With patient all »dragons« can be trained.
You need to trust others, but not too much.
You can't change what others do. But you can decide how to respond. Their actions are not your burden, they're your raw material.
It's never too late!
Panic steals time and solves nothing. Stay calm, clarity is your strongest tool.
Sooner is always better.
It is all about trust.
The most precious treasure is being loved.
Expect unexpected.
Tomorrow is another day.
Some things are more important than winning or being better than others.
Our past is a shadow we cannot outrun. But when it catches up, we must stand tall and learn from its whispers.
Sometimes the crazy way is the only way.
Sometimes, the last person you want to relay on, is the one you end up being stuck.
Most of people are afraid of things, because they don't understand them.
Often, defense is the best offense.
Having courage isn't the same as having no fear. It's being afraid and pushing forward anyway, whatever that means
They laughed at me because I am different. I laugh at them because they are all the same.
They may not realize it yet, but they need you.
All are marked by a weakness... some just hide it better.
There is nothing wrong with being upset. It is just mean that you care.
Bad thing happens when you try to beat others.
Your phone has already replaced your watch, camera, calendar, and alarm clock. Don't let it replace your family!
Haters are a sign you're visible enough to matter.
Every plan is better than no plan.
If a someone is captured for too long, they don't know how to be free anymore.
Never say never.
A group is only as strong as its weakest member.
You don't need to be great to start. But you need to start, to be great.
You can't predict your enemy's every move - but remember that there is a solution for every situation.
When you start looking at the things differently, you start seeing things you didn't before.
